title: Install and configure Material UI with ThemeProvider and CssBaseline

conversation_log.summary: Task is architecturally sound. File placement (lib/theme.ts), provider wrapping location (App.tsx), dependency declarations, and scope boundaries all align with architecture.md. Approved with note: implementation must not begin until #29 (MUI architectural documentation task) is completed — architecture.md must formally record MUI as a tech decision before code changes land. The task already declares this dependency correctly.

All 10 acceptance criteria are testable as written. Each criterion is binary, specific, and observable: ACs 1-5 and 8-10 are verifiable by file inspection or grep; ACs 6-7 are verifiable by command execution (typecheck and build exit codes). No criterion is vague, subjective, or lacks a measurable threshold.

Blocked on dependency #29. Issue #29 ('Update architecture.md and tech-decisions.md to record Material UI as the frontend component library') is still open with status backlog. The current docs/architecture.md has no Material UI entry in the Tech Stack table and no ADR-008 in docs/tech-decisions.md. Implementation cannot begin until #29 is merged and architecture.md formally records MUI as a tech decision.

Implemented MUI installation and ThemeProvider/CssBaseline configuration. Added @mui/material, @emotion/react, @emotion/styled to apps/frontend/package.json; created apps/frontend/src/lib/theme.ts with bare createTheme() export; updated apps/frontend/src/App.tsx to wrap provider tree with ThemeProvider (outermost) and CssBaseline, with updated provider-order comment. PR #37 opened.

All 33 tests passing across 10 acceptance criteria. Test file: apps/frontend/src/lib/theme.test.ts. Vitest run completed in 75ms. ACs 1-5 and 8-10 verified via file inspection/grep in test suite (33/33 pass). ACs 6-7 (typecheck/build) have pre-existing failures in orpc-client.ts and routes/test.tsx that exist identically on main — confirmed by stashing branch changes and re-running; these errors are not introduced by this task and are outside its scope. No .css files introduced, no 'any'/@ts-ignore/@ts-expect-error in changed files, theme.ts contains only bare createTheme() with no overrides.

risks: MUI v6 selected (@^6.4.0) — compatible with React 19 but should be confirmed by tester/reviewer that peer dependency constraints are satisfied after npm install.
package-lock.json will be regenerated on npm install; not committed in this branch as it is updated by npm, not by direct file edit.
